embeds.title: 🔫 GTA V Online — Modding Guide
embeds.description:
Mod menus, RP / stats / money editing, and injection — for **GTA V Enhanced**.
⚠️ -# Modding online breaks Rockstar's ToS and can get accounts banned. Use an **alt account** and proceed at your own risk.

fields.name: 🎮 How to Inject (YimMenu)
fields.value:
1. Rockstar Launcher → **GTA V Enhanced** → Settings → **disable BattlEye**. On Steam/Epic you may also need the `-nobattleye` launch parameter.
2. Launch GTA V, then inject **`YimMenuV2.dll`** at the main menu.
3. Play modded on YimMenu, or relaunch for vanilla.
-# ⚠️ Before going vanilla: **close Xenos and launch WITH BattlEye.**

fields.name: 🟢 RP Level  ·  Safe
fields.value:
**Recovery → Stat Editor**
Name: `MPX_CHAR_SET_RP_GIFT_ADMIN` — replace **X** with your slot (`MP0` = 1st char, `MP1` = 2nd).
Enter the **RP number** (not the level) — look it up at [gtaoxp](https://gtaoxp.github.io/) — then click **Write**.

fields.name: 🟢 Stats  ·  Safe
fields.value:
**Recovery → Stat Editor** — set each to **100**:
`MPX_SCRIPT_INCREASE_STAM` — Stamina
`MPX_SCRIPT_INCREASE_SHO` — Shooting
`MPX_SCRIPT_INCREASE_STL` — Stealth
`MPX_SCRIPT_INCREASE_STRN` — Strength
`MPX_SCRIPT_INCREASE_LUNG` — Lung capacity
`MPX_SCRIPT_INCREASE_DRIV` — Driving
`MPX_SCRIPT_INCREASE_FLY` — Flying

fields.name: 🟡 Money  ·  Risky
fields.value:
**Recovery → Transactions**
Type: **SERVICE**  ·  Category: **SERVICE_WTIH_THRESHOLD**  ·  Action: **EARN**
Item: `SERVICE_EARN_JOB_BONUS`
Price: `15000000` — going higher is riskier.

fields.name: 🔁 Get Un-Banned (Epic Games)
fields.value:
Submit a [Rockstar support ticket](https://support.rockstargames.com/request/account/account-settings/linking-unlinking-accounts) to unlink Epic:
```
I'd like to unlink my Epic Games account as soon as possible. I understand this will lose my online progress. Epic ID: <your id>. I confirm — please do not ask for further confirmation.
```
-# Attach a screenshot of your Epic account page with the Epic ID visible.
